title: selaginella brevifolia
intro: Selaginella brevifolia, also known as the dwarf spike moss or short-spiked spike moss, is a species of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Selaginella brevifolia include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as diabetes, cancer, and cardiovascular disease, as well as improving cognitive function and reducing stress. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella brevifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the dried plant material typically being steeped in hot water to release its active compounds.
